title: aster novi-belgii subsp. brumalis
intro: Aster novi-belgii subsp. brumalis, also known as New York aster, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its bright purple flowers and robust growth. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Aster novi-belgii subsp. brumalis include reducing fever, alleviating colds and flu, and providing relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal properties.
